candidate_definitions.text: An abstract-level database backed by LevelDB.

**An [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database backed by [LevelDB](https://github.com/google/leveldb).** The successor to [`leveldown`](https://github.com/Level/leveldown) with builtin encodings, sublevels, events, hooks and support of Uint8Array. If y…
Discussion, support and common information for projects in the community.
**Discussion, support and common information for projects in the community.**
Abstract class for a lexicographically sorted key-value database.
**Abstract class for a lexicographically sorted key-value database.** Provides encodings, sublevels, events and hooks. If you are upgrading, please see [`UPGRADING.md`](UPGRADING.md).
An open list of awesome Level modules and resources.
**An open list of awesome [Level][level-org] modules and resources. [Add yours!](#contributing)**
Read from an abstract-level database using Node.js streams.
**Read from an [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database using Node.js streams.**
An abstract-level database for browsers, backed by IndexedDB.

**An [`abstract-level`][abstract-level] database for browsers, backed by [IndexedDB][indexeddb].** The successor to [`level-js`](https://github.com/Level/level-js). If you are upgrading, please see [UPGRADING.md](UPGRADING.md).
An abstract-leveldown implementation that wraps another store to encrypt the stored values.
<!-- ALL-CONTRIBUTORS-BADGE:START - Do not remove or modify this section -->
Read from an abstract-level database using Web Streams.

**Read and write to an [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database using [Web Streams](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Streams_API).** Compatible with browsers and Node.js.
Superseded by memory-level. In-memory abstract-leveldown store for Node.js and browsers.
**Superseded by [`memory-level`](https://github.com/Level/memory-level). Please see [Frequently Asked Questions](https://github.com/Level/community#faq).**
Superseded by browser-level. An abstract-leveldown compliant store on top of IndexedDB.
**Superseded by [`browser-level`](https://github.com/Level/browser-level). Please see [Frequently Asked Questions](https://github.com/Level/community#faq).**
Superseded by abstract-level. A wrapper for abstract-leveldown compliant stores, for Node.js and browsers.
**Superseded by [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level). Please see [Frequently Asked Questions](https://github.com/Level/community#faq).**
Universal abstract-level database for Node.js and browsers.

**Universal [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database for Node.js and browsers.** This is a convenience package that exports [`classic-level`](https://github.com/Level/classic-level) in Node.js and [`browser-level`](https://github.com/Level/browser-lev…
Superseded by memory-level. A convenience package bundling levelup and memdown.
**Superseded by [`memory-level`](https://github.com/Level/memory-level). Please see [Frequently Asked Questions](https://github.com/Level/community#faq).**
In-memory abstract-level database for Node.js and browsers.

**In-memory [`abstract-level`][abstract-level] database for Node.js and browsers, backed by a [fully persistent red-black tree](https://www.npmjs.com/package/functional-red-black-tree).** The successor to [`memdown`](https://github.com/Level/memdown) and [`level-mem`](https://gi…
Encode data with built-in or custom encodings.

**Encode data with built-in or custom encodings.** The successor to [`level-codec`][level-codec] that transcodes encodings from and to internal data formats supported by a database. This allows a database to store data in a format of its choice (Buffer, Uint8Array or String) wit…
Create a manifest describing the abilities of an abstract-level database.

**Create a manifest describing the abilities of an [`abstract-level`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database.** No longer compatible with [`levelup`](https://github.com/Level/levelup) or [`abstract-leveldown`](https://github.com/Level/abstract-leveldown) since version…
Superseded by many-level. Multilevel implemented using leveldowns with reconnect support.
**Superseded by [`many-level`](https://github.com/Level/many-level). Please see [Frequently Asked Questions](https://github.com/Level/community#faq).**
Demonstrates bundling level for browsers using browserify.
> **Demonstrates bundling [`level`](https://github.com/Level/level) for browsers using [`browserify`](https://github.com/browserify/browserify).**
Demonstrates bundling level for browsers using webpack.
> **Demonstrates bundling [`level`](https://github.com/Level/level) for browsers using [`webpack`](https://webpack.js.org/).**
Share an abstract-level database over the network or other kind of stream.

**Share an [abstract-level](https://github.com/Level/abstract-level) database over the network or other kind of stream.** The successor to [`multileveldown`](https://github.com/Level/multileveldown). If you are upgrading, please see [UPGRADING.md](UPGRADING.md).
